item.title: Beginning Anew
item.description: Greetings! You will never believe what i just saw this day.

item.title: Company and a weird well
item.description: A new week, a new story of those interesting people i found last time! You know last week that those people were bugging Chompy? well turns out they could have used the potions he is selling as they entered the nearby underground ruins on request of Lisbeth.

item.title: Yholis
item.description: A small village near the mountains and the coast.

item.title: THE STORY
item.description: World The world of Khalhia is a peaceful country where Both man and animal could live in harmony.

item.title: Grimwel Town
item.description: General Info Grimwel is a small, coastal Town near the southern edge of the kingdom of Khalhia.

item.title: D&D Campaign Wiki
item.description: Welcome to my D&D Campaign This is my digital garden for D&D campaign and Lore If you’re here without getting the link from me, please leave you’re not supposed to read this yet :) Contents Browse the wiki using the explorer on the left or search above.
